results.title: Supabase JS Client
results.description: Supabase JS is an isomorphic JavaScript client for Supabase, enabling seamless interaction with your database and backend services from various JavaScript environments.

results.title: Supabase
results.description: Supabase is an open-source backend platform providing a full Postgres database, authentication, storage, real-time, and edge functions to help developers build applications quickly.

results.title: Supabase
results.description: Supabase is the Postgres development platform, offering features like hosted Postgres, authentication, auto-generated APIs, functions, and file storage using enterprise-grade open source tools.

results.title: Supabase
results.description: Supabase is an open-source platform providing a suite of backend tools for building web and mobile applications, including a PostgreSQL database, authentication, instant APIs, and storage.

results.title: Advenahq Supabase JS
results.description: A high-performance, type-safe Supabase client wrapper for Next.js projects with server-side caching support, Row Level Security, and security-first design for both SSR/SSG and client contexts.

results.title: Supabase Swift
results.description: A Swift client library for interacting with Supabase, mirroring the design of supabase-js, enabling database operations, authentication, and real-time subscriptions.

results.title: Supabase Full-Stack SaaS Template
results.description: A production-ready SaaS template built with Next.js 15 and Supabase, featuring authentication, user management, file storage, and real-time updates with row-level security.

results.title: Y-Supabase
results.description: y-supabase is a Supabase Realtime provider for Yjs, enabling collaborative applications by syncing CRDT data through Supabase channels.

results.title: Supabase Postgrest-js
results.description: An isomorphic JavaScript client for PostgREST that provides an ORM-like restful interface for interacting with PostgreSQL databases.

results.title: Next.js Supabase Stripe Starter
results.description: Bootstrap your SaaS with a modern tech stack including Next.js, Supabase, Stripe, React Email, and Tailwind CSS, featuring webhooks for Stripe-Supabase synchronization and prebuilt pages.

results.title: Supacache
results.description: Supacache is a secure, lightweight, high-performance caching middleware for supabase-js, built on Cloudflare Workers and D1 to reduce Supabase egress costs and improve performance.

results.title: Launch MVP Stripe Nextjs Supabase
results.description: A production-ready Next.js template with authentication, dark mode, Stripe integration, and a modern UI, built with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.

results.title: Supabase API
results.description: Supabase API is a RESTful API for managing backend services including authentication, database, storage, edge functions, and real-time capabilities.

results.title: Supabase Error Translator JS
results.description: A JavaScript library that translates Supabase error codes and messages into 9 different languages, enhancing user experience with localized error feedback.

results.title: Supabase UI
results.description: Supabase UI is a React UI library that provides pre-built components for building user interfaces with Supabase, including authentication features.

results.title: Supabase CLI
results.description: The Supabase CLI is a command-line interface tool for managing Supabase projects, enabling local development, database migrations, function deployment, type generation, and authenticated API requests.

results.title: Supabase Realtime Chat
results.description: A Next.js project that implements a real-time chat application, likely utilizing Supabase for backend services and real-time functionalities.

results.title: Yoobe v3
results.description: Yoobe v3 is a Brazilian e-commerce/marketplace platform for managing promotional products and corporate kits, built with Next.js 14 and Supabase.

results.title: Dodo Payments Supabase Subscription Starter
results.description: A minimal subscription starter kit and boilerplate built with Next.js, Supabase, and Dodo Payments to quickly set up a subscription-based SaaS with authentication, payments, and webhooks.

results.title: SaaS App - LMS with Next.js, Supabase & Payments
results.description: A high-powered SaaS template with built-in user authentication, subscriptions, and payments using Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe.

results.title: Supabase Elixir
results.description: Supabase Elixir is a community SDK that provides Elixir developers with integrations for Supabase services including authentication, database, storage, edge functions, and real-time capabilities.

results.title: Supabase Py
results.description: Python client for Supabase, enabling interaction with databases, authentication, storage, and edge functions.

results.title: Supabase SSR
results.description: Supabase clients for use in SSR frameworks, providing a framework-agnostic way to create a Supabase client for server-side rendering.

results.title: Supabase Auth RS
results.description: A Rust implementation of the Supabase JS Auth client, providing a feature-rich and easy-to-use API for authentication, including email/password, phone, OAuth, and SSO.

results.title: Supabase C#
results.description: Supabase C# is a .NET client library that integrates with Supabase services, providing features for real-time data, authentication, storage, and serverless functions.

results.title: Supabase Sentry JS Integration
results.description: A Sentry JavaScript SDK integration designed to instrument the Supabase JavaScript SDK, collecting traces, breadcrumbs, and errors across browser, Node, and edge environments.

results.title: Supabase Python Client
results.description: Supabase Python Client is a library for interacting with Postgres databases, managing authentication, invoking Edge Functions, listening to database changes, and handling file storage through the Supabase platform.

results.title: Supamode
results.description: Supamode transforms your Supabase database into a CMS, allowing you to manage and extend your application's business logic.

results.title: Nextbase Ultimate - Complete SaaS Boilerplate
results.description: A comprehensive Next.js SaaS boilerplate with 81 documentation files covering authentication, payments, admin panel, real-time features, and production-ready deployment. Built with Next.js App Router, Supabase, Stripe, TypeScript, and modern React patterns for rapid SaaS development.

results.description: Supabase C# Documentation
